name: Decision matrix
when_to_use: 需要把少量候选方案按多项重要性不同的标准做可解释选型时用它，例如工具采购、供应商筛选、架构方案或地点评估；若只需展示功能有无而不计算权重，用 comparison-table；若需要用户现场改权重并把选择回传 AI，应改用可编辑决策工具。
why_valuable: 模型常会算错权重、把分母混成原始满分，或只报结论而看不出依据；本组件按明确公式在浏览器内计算 0–100 加权总分，自动标出赢家，并用分档热度让强弱项一眼可见。

en.when_to_use: Use it to make an explainable choice among a small number of options using criteria with different importance, such as tool procurement, vendor selection, architecture options, or site evaluation. If you only need to show feature presence without weights, use comparison-table; if users must change weights live and send the choice back to AI, use an editable decision tool.
en.why_valuable: Models often miscalculate weights, use a raw maximum as the denominator, or report only a conclusion with no visible basis; this component calculates a 0-100 weighted total in the browser from an explicit formula, marks the winner automatically, and uses heat bands to make strengths and weaknesses obvious.

data_in.note: data is an option-major decision matrix: options defines columns, criteria defines weighted rows, and scores[optionIndex][criterionIndex] is the corresponding raw score. Every criterion.weight should be non-negative and at least one must be greater than 0; maxScore defaults to 5. The component clamps scores to 0-maxScore and calculates totals as sum(score/maxScore*weight)/sum(weight)*100; missing or nonnumeric scores contribute 0, and the first option wins a tie.

schema.title?: string -- title; displays "Decision matrix" when omitted
schema.description?: string -- short decision context below the title; displays the option and criterion counts when omitted
schema.options: {name:string,note?:string}[] -- candidate option columns; name is the option name and note is one line of supporting text
schema.criteria: {label:string,weight:number,maxScore?:number}[] -- evaluation-criterion rows; weight is non-negative, and maxScore must be greater than 0 and defaults to 5
schema.scores: number[][] -- option-major raw score matrix, read strictly as scores[optionIndex][criterionIndex]
schema._calculation: Each cell is normalized to score/maxScore, weighted by weight, and divided by the total positive weight, then multiplied by 100; raw scores are clamped to the valid range

spec.note: Grows with the number of criteria; the table body scrolls internally above 640px. On narrow screens it scrolls horizontally and keeps the criterion column, header, and total row sticky. No vh or percentage heights, and no carrier-size measurement.

data_in.note: data 是 option-major 决策矩阵：options 定义列，criteria 定义带权重的行，scores[optionIndex][criterionIndex] 是对应原始分。每项 criterion.weight 应为非负数且至少一项大于 0；maxScore 默认 5。组件将分数夹到 0–maxScore，按 Σ(score/maxScore×weight)/Σ(weight)×100 自算总分；缺失或非数字按 0 贡献，同分时先出现者获 Winner。

schema.title?: string —— 标题；省略时显示 “Decision matrix”
schema.description?: string —— 标题下的决策背景短句；省略时显示方案数与标准数
schema.options: {name:string,note?:string}[] —— 候选方案列；name 为方案名，note 为一行补充
schema.criteria: {label:string,weight:number,maxScore?:number}[] —— 评估标准行；weight 非负，maxScore 必须大于 0且默认 5
schema.scores: number[][] —— option-major 原始分矩阵，严格按 scores[optionIndex][criterionIndex] 取值
schema._calculation: 各单元先归一化为 score/maxScore，再按 weight 加权并除以正权重总和，最终乘 100；原始分会夹到合法范围

spec.note: 按标准数量增高，表体最高 640px 后内部滚动；窄屏横向滚动并粘住标准列、表头和总分行。无 vh/百分比高度，不依赖载体尺寸测量。

example._why: 三个真实感项目管理工具、四项不同权重标准与非平凡分差可同时验证加权计算、热度、赢家列和窄屏表格布局。

uplink: 纯 display 计算与展示，无 uplink；赢家与总分只由传入数据本地推导，不把方案选择或评分回传宿主。

carriers.artifact: supported:boot.artifact 已在 sandboxed iframe 中以 example.minimal 原样渲染验证；CSS 与 DOM 全部位于自有 shadow root
carriers.widget: supported:与 artifact 同一零依赖模板，仅 parent 改为 shadowRoot；可在载体 shadow 内再挂自有 shadow
carriers.codex: supported:与已验证的 artifact boot 相同，document.getElementById('viz') 为唯一载体挂载点

isolation.evidence: self-authored inline-template, owns its shadow, zero imports/fetch/global footprint; weighted calculation and render verified
